name: GWR Group Limited
description: GWR Group Limited is an independent Australian mineral exploration and development company. The company is primarily focused on the exploration and development of its flagship Wiluna West Iron Ore Project and the Wiluna West Gold Project in Western Australia. GWR Group also holds interests in other mineral commodities, including gold, copper, and tungsten, through various joint ventures and investments, aiming to create value for shareholders through strategic resource development.
